Asset Not in Registry — Saved for Verification

A form submission referenced an asset not found in the Asset Registry. It has been written to the Inspections sheet with a REVIEW- record ID and flagged in the Focus Area column.

parameters.completionMessage: =Please go back and correct the following: {{ $json.validationErrors.join("; ") }}

parameters.content:
## NALA Inspection Form to Workbook

Replaces Microsoft Forms + Power Automate. Public form URL: /form/inspection-form.

Writes the full A:Y (25-col) Inspections layout in Nerizon_Structural_Integrity_Assessment_NALA_Testing1.xlsx (Test Run folder). Photos upload to an Inspection Photos subfolder; links appear in the alert emails.

Before activating: confirm the Microsoft Graph + SMTP credentials, create the Inspection Photos subfolder in OneDrive, and test via the Test URL.

## Phase 2
- Write photo links to the Photo_Register sheet
- Optional raw-submission log (n8n Data Table)
- Capture Mechanisms / Sub-Component / Vibration / Impact / Safety / Focus Area and map to cols O-R, L, Y

options.formDescription: Options below are specific to the Category selected on the previous page.
Risk Level is auto-calculated from Consequence x Likelihood (Glencore matrix).

values.html:
Review your inspection

Check every value below and edit anything that needs correcting, then press Confirm & Submit. Note: photos added earlier cannot be changed here — restart only if the photos are wrong.

values.defaultValue: ={{ $('Risk Evaluation').item.json.priorityRating ?? $('Risk Evaluation').item.json['Priority Rating (P1 Critical - P5 Good)'] ?? '' }}
